project.title: Mitochondrial LC-MS/MS in Hep3B cells
project.projectDescription: We sought to identify mitochondrially translocated proteins with previously unrecognized contributions to hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC), using LC-MS/MS-based proteomics analysis.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: The proteins of the isolated mitochondria from the Hep3B cells were digested into the peptides. The peptides were prepared according to a preparation kit (Thermo: 90057), and analyzed on a QE-plus mass spectrometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific, Waltham, MA, USA) equipped with an EASY-nLC 1200 nano liquid chromatography (HPLC) system (Thermo Fisher Scientific, Waltham, MA, 448 USA).
project.dataProcessingProtocol: All data were further analyzed using proteomics discovery software (Thermo Scientific Proteome Discoverer 2.2.) against the human UniProt15 database.
